settings.heading: Unboxing and kit contents
settings.text: Confirm base, hose, de-shedding brush, slicker brush, clipper body, clipper guards, nozzle, filters, cleaning brush, manual, plug, and storage dock.
settings.evidence: Evidence needed: sample photos, accessory count, carton weight, and box dimensions.

settings.heading: Noise and quiet-start intro
settings.text: Measure background room noise, low/high settings from 1 ft and 3 ft, then film the sound-introduction routine before brushing near a pet.
settings.evidence: Evidence needed: repeated readings and a short introduction video.

settings.heading: Fur cup capture
settings.text: Run a short brush pass on a safe loose-fur source, photograph what enters the cup, and compare room cleanup before and after the pass.
settings.evidence: Evidence needed: fur cup close-up and before/after room frame.

settings.heading: Filter care and replacement parts
settings.text: Confirm whether the filter is washable or replacement-only, how long it takes to dry, and whether the supplier can ship filter packs separately.
settings.evidence: Evidence needed: filter photos, care note, and replacement SKU confirmation.

settings.heading: Plug, voltage, labels, and manual
settings.text: Verify launch-market plug options, voltage label, English manual, warning text, and supplier documentation before publishing exact claims.
settings.evidence: Evidence needed: label photos and supplier documents.

settings.heading: What FurQuiet must prove before checkout scales.
settings.text: A public testing log for the FurQuiet grooming vacuum kit. It gives first-batch visitors a clear reason to trust the launch process without inventing reviews, ratings, or exact performance claims.
settings.status_note: Exact noise, suction, packaging, filter, and pet-tolerance claims stay pending until a physical sample is measured and photographed.

settings.text: No sample proof, no hard scale.
The first-batch list can collect demand now, but product-page claims and serious checkout volume should wait for supplier documents, sample photos, actual measurements, and shipping math.
